description: A recruiter wants to schedule a 30-minute phone screen with a promising candidate.

nodes.task_description: Identify the candidate to be screened.

expected_outcome.expected: Recruiter selects the candidate in the ATS.

nodes.task_description: Use a scheduling tool (e.g., Calendly) to send the candidate a link to the recruiter's availability.

expected_outcome.expected: Recruiter sends an email with the scheduling link.

nodes.task_description: Once the candidate selects a time, confirm the appointment is automatically added to both calendars.

expected_outcome.expected: Recruiter verifies the meeting appears on their calendar.
